tooltip.ae2_overclocked.capacity_card: Increases internal slot stack limits for processing machines.
tooltip.ae2_overclocked.super_energy_car: Increases the machine's internal energy buffer capacity.
tooltip.ae2_overclocked.overclock_card: Compresses processing time to 1 tick and outputs products directly to the ME network.
tooltip.ae2_overclocked.super_speed_card: Boosts throughput for I/O Ports and import/export buses.
tooltip.ae2_overclocked.parallel_card: Processes recipes in parallel and outputs products directly to the ME network.
message.ae2_overclocked.parallel_card_co: Another parallel card is already installed. Only one parallel card per machine is allowed.
config.ae2_overclocked.cards.tooltip: Balance settings for Capacity / Super Energy / Parallel Max cards.
config.ae2_overclocked.cards.capacityCar: Maximum stack size per machine slot when Capacity Card is installed.
config.ae2_overclocked.cards.superEnergy: Internal energy buffer limit in FE when Super Energy Card is installed. (Internally converted with 1 AE = 2 FE)
config.ae2_overclocked.cards.parallelCar: Parallel multiplier used by Parallel Card Max.
config.ae2_overclocked.cards.superSpeedC: Multiplier applied to I/O ports and import/export buses when Super Speed Card is active.
config.ae2_overclocked.protection.toolti: Safety options to prevent accidental machine break.
config.ae2_overclocked.protection.breakP: If total internal items are above this value, you must hold Shift to break the machine.
config.ae2_overclocked.machines.tooltip: Disable overclock/parallel/capacity/energy effects for specific machines by block ID.
config.ae2_overclocked.machines.disabled: Use block IDs in namespace:path format, e.g. ae2:inscriber, ae2cs:crystal_pulverizer.
message.ae2_overclocked.break_block_too_: Too many items inside the machine (> %s). Hold Shift while breaking to force removal.
pack.ae2_overclocked.dynamic_1211.name: AE2 Overclocked 1.21.1 Dynamic Texture Pack
pack.ae2_overclocked.dynamic_1211.desc: Dynamic textures for AE2 Overclocked 1.21.1 parallel cards
